allow: Bash(timeout 180 bash -c 'while true; do LOGS=$\(docker-compose logs --tail=100 worker 2>&1 | grep ""AUTOLOGIN TRACE.*About to call session_mgr.auto_login""\); if [ ! -z ""$LOGS"" ]; then echo ""$LOGS""; echo """"; echo ""⏱️  Auto-login started! Waiting up to 120s for completion...""; sleep 125; docker-compose logs worker 2>&1 | grep ""AUTOLOGIN TRACE"" | tail -10; break; fi; sleep 5; done')
